articles.title: 실패한 국가 배후 추정 공격 해부
articles.summary:

articles.title: 가짜 트랙션 문제
articles.summary:
• 헬스케어 스타트업에서 초기 긍정 신호를 시장 검증이 끝나기도 전에 창업자가 트랙션으로 믿어버리는 순간이 펀드레이징에서 가장 위험한 시점 중 하나

articles.title: '기획 하네스(planning harness)'로 완성하는 상세기획 워크플로우 자동화
articles.summary:
기획자들이 AI를 활용할 때 상위기획은 잘 자동화하면서도 상세기획에서는 여전히 수작업으로 고생하는 문제를 다루고 있음.
주변 개발자의 조언으로 '기획 하네스(Planning Harness)' 개념을 도입해 이를 해결한 사례 중심의 내용.

기획 하네스(planning harness)란?
. AI가 일관된 규칙과 컨텍스

articles.title: Trump Admin releases Anthropic  Mythos to be used by more than 100 US companies, agencies
articles.summary: Over 100 companies and government agencies are reportedly authorized to use Mythos 5, including their non-American employees.

articles.title: FTC gives Musk the OK to acquire SpaceX alumni startup Mesh
articles.summary: Mesh came out of stealth in February with a $50 million Series A.

articles.title: Corgi, the buzzy Y Combinator-backed insurance tech startup, says it didn’t steal an open source product
articles.summary: Corgi became embroiled in  controversy when Papermark accused it of stealing its software. Corgi says it did not, raising new questions about vibe coding.

articles.title: Novak Djokovic has a new job —  advisor to private equity firm General Atlantic
articles.summary: General Atlantic has tapped tennis legend Novak Djokovic to serve as a global strategic advisor.

articles.title: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm
articles.summary: “We don’t believe this kind of government access process should become the long-term default,” says OpenAI. “It keeps the best tools from users, developers, enterprises, cyber defenders, and global partners who need them.”
